metadata.description: Panecho AI Agents Bundle — install the Panecho skill (drive the privacy-hardened cmux macOS terminal from Claude Code) plus a folder of copy-paste socket-API recipes.

plugins.name: panecho
plugins.description: Teaches Claude Code to drive Panecho (the privacy-hardened fork of cmux): workspaces, panes, surfaces, browser automation, notifications, sidebar metadata, session restore, and the privacy-mode rules agents must respect. macOS 14+.
